purpose: Track every public semantic declaration introduced by Goal 2 separately from the frozen Goal 1 comparison cohort.

allowedFields.relation: Named semantic relation established or defined by the declaration.
allowedFields.owner: Goal 2 stage or milestone responsible for the declaration.
allowedFields.consumer: A real public or downstream declaration that exercises the API.
allowedFields.axiomAudit: Axiom-audit declaration name or explicit pending status.
